channel.title: Discover - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: Trending content from your personal network

item.title: ormer Wisconsin Judge Hannah Dugan was spared from prison We…
item.author: CNN (@cnn.com)
item.description: ormer Wisconsin Judge Hannah Dugan was spared from prison Wednesday for ushering a Mexican defendant out of her courtroom to evade US Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents. A federal judge fined her $5,000 and cited her otherwise law-abiding life in issuing the sentence.
item.content:encoded: ormer Wisconsin Judge Hannah Dugan was spared from prison Wednesday for ushering a Mexican defendant out of her courtroom to evade US Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents. A federal judge fined her $5,000 and cited her otherwise law-abiding life in issuing the sentence.

item.title: 📩 Go in-depth on Bloomberg Games. Get behind-the-scenes in…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description:
📩 Go in-depth on Bloomberg Games.

Get behind-the-scenes insights into Pointed and Alphadots, learn how they're built, and pick up strategies to improve your play. Sign up for the Bonus Points newsletter:
item.content:encoded:
📩 Go in-depth on Bloomberg Games.

Get behind-the-scenes insights into Pointed and Alphadots, learn how they're built, and pick up strategies to improve your play. Sign up for the Bonus Points newsletter:

item.title: Meet the Nano Banana family: built to solve your image pipel…
item.author: Google for Developers (@developers.google.com)
item.description:
Meet the Nano Banana family: built to solve your image pipeline constraints. 🍌

From lightning-fast drafting to state-of-the-art 4K generation, see how the next-gen image models stack up - swipe to find your perfect match!

Start playing in Google AI Studio: goo.gle/googleaistudio
item.content:encoded:
Meet the Nano Banana family: built to solve your image pipeline constraints. 🍌

From lightning-fast drafting to state-of-the-art 4K generation, see how the next-gen image models stack up - swipe to find your perfect match!

Start playing in Google AI Studio: goo.gle/googleaistudio

item.title: An elderly man caring for his aging dog shows the kind of lo…
item.author: Digital Brain (@yourdigitalbrain.bsky.social)
item.description: An elderly man caring for his aging dog shows the kind of loyalty dogs teach us without words. Senior dogs need extra attention, but the bond only deepens with time.
item.content:encoded: An elderly man caring for his aging dog shows the kind of loyalty dogs teach us without words. Senior dogs need extra attention, but the bond only deepens with time.

item.title: 【今日のこよみ】 2026年7月9日(木) 旧暦5月25日 大安 甲申（きのえ さる） 十二直 のぞく 潮回り 長潮 …

旧暦5月25日　大安
甲申（きのえ さる）
十二直 のぞく

潮回り 長潮
正午月齢 24.0
正午月相 22.3

item.title: You don't have to be Scottish to have Scotland in your heart…
item.author: JourneyDude in Scotland (@scottishinsider.org)
item.description:
You don't have to be Scottish to have Scotland in your heart. 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿❤️⛰️✨

Calendars here: weescotland.com
#moody #highlands #photography #visitscotland #lovescotland #beautiful #scotland #landscape #sunset

item.title: I am shaking because I found a LeBron James rookie card that…
item.author: Gurt Sherm (@gurtsherm.bsky.social)
item.description:
I am shaking because I found a LeBron James rookie card that sells between $150 and $400

and somehow when I was eight years old I hat the foresight to put it in a sealed container
item.content:encoded:
I am shaking because I found a LeBron James rookie card that sells between $150 and $400

and somehow when I was eight years old I hat the foresight to put it in a sealed container

item.title: Parents of some babies have been unable to set up Trump Acco…
item.author: The Wall Street Journal (@wsj.com)
item.description:
Parents of some babies have been unable to set up Trump Accounts, the new investment program for children that opened on Saturday.

The delays affect a subset of children born in 2026 with newly issued Social Security numbers.
item.content:encoded:
Parents of some babies have been unable to set up Trump Accounts, the new investment program for children that opened on Saturday.

The delays affect a subset of children born in 2026 with newly issued Social Security numbers.

item.title: X plans to send users direct messages when posts they’ve lik…
item.author: TechCrunch (@techcrunch.com)
item.description: X plans to send users direct messages when posts they’ve liked, replied to, or reposted receive Community Notes, an update aimed at addressing criticism that the platform’s crowdsourced fact-checking system often arrives too late to curb misinformation.
item.content:encoded: X plans to send users direct messages when posts they’ve liked, replied to, or reposted receive Community Notes, an update aimed at addressing criticism that the platform’s crowdsourced fact-checking system often arrives too late to curb misinformation.

item.title: Please feel free to rock out to The Go's title track, "Free …
item.author: Sub Pop Records (@subpop.bsky.social)
item.description: Please feel free to rock out to The Go's title track, "Free Electricity," from their long-lost album, which will finally surface in physical form on Sept. 4th. Secure this piece of Detroit history on Metallic Gold vinyl while supplies last-> music.subpop.com/thego_freeel...
item.content:encoded: Please feel free to rock out to The Go's title track, "Free Electricity," from their long-lost album, which will finally surface in physical form on Sept. 4th. Secure this piece of Detroit history on Metallic Gold vinyl while supplies last-> music.subpop.com/thego_freeel...

item.title: HBO Max received 122 Emmy nominations, Netflix landed 111, D…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
HBO Max received 122 Emmy nominations, Netflix landed 111, Disney received 111 overall, Apple scored 87, its most-ever, and Amazon landed 39 for Prime and MGM+ (Peter White/Deadline)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:
HBO Max received 122 Emmy nominations, Netflix landed 111, Disney received 111 overall, Apple scored 87, its most-ever, and Amazon landed 39 for Prime and MGM+ (Peter White/Deadline)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink

item.title: このたび、第十八回伊丹十三賞を受賞いたしました。 のんさん、星野源さん、宮藤官九郎さん…と、歴代の受賞者がきらびやかすぎ…
item.author: 岸本佐知子 (@karyobinga.bsky.social)
item.description:
このたび、第十八回伊丹十三賞を受賞いたしました。
のんさん、星野源さん、宮藤官九郎さん…と、歴代の受賞者がきらびやかすぎて、「本当においらでいいのかい?？」と大いにキョドっておりますが、素直に嬉しいです。
ありがとうございます。

www.asahi.com/and/entertai...
item.content:encoded:
このたび、第十八回伊丹十三賞を受賞いたしました。
のんさん、星野源さん、宮藤官九郎さん…と、歴代の受賞者がきらびやかすぎて、「本当においらでいいのかい?？」と大いにキョドっておりますが、素直に嬉しいです。
ありがとうございます。

www.asahi.com/and/entertai...

item.title: 鶏のタルタルソースかけを作ってみた ゆで卵を作る 潰してマヨネーズを入れる 胡椒も入れる タルタルソース完成〜 鶏肉…
item.author: ShoreFreak (@shorefreak.bsky.social)
item.description:
鶏のタルタルソースかけを作ってみた

ゆで卵を作る
潰してマヨネーズを入れる
胡椒も入れる
タルタルソース完成〜

鶏肉にフォークで穴を開ける
塩胡椒をふる

油を入れて、皮から焼いて反対も焼く
油が出るのでキッチンペーパーで拭く

醤油大さじ2、砂糖大さじ半分を入れる

お皿に移してタルタルソースをかける
完成〜

卵の黄身が黄色かったんでタルタル黄色いなぁ
item.content:encoded:
鶏のタルタルソースかけを作ってみた

ゆで卵を作る
潰してマヨネーズを入れる
胡椒も入れる
タルタルソース完成〜

鶏肉にフォークで穴を開ける
塩胡椒をふる

油を入れて、皮から焼いて反対も焼く
油が出るのでキッチンペーパーで拭く

醤油大さじ2、砂糖大さじ半分を入れる

お皿に移してタルタルソースをかける
完成〜

卵の黄身が黄色かったんでタルタル黄色いなぁ

item.title: #ブルスカ一点集中な絵描きさんと繋がりたい #自創作に狂っている人間と繋がりたい 併用して使わせていただきます…！ 呟き…
item.author: スズメヤ (@suzume810ka.bsky.social)
item.description:
#ブルスカ一点集中な絵描きさんと繋がりたい
#自創作に狂っている人間と繋がりたい
併用して使わせていただきます…！
呟き系のSNSは青空くんしか利用して無いです＞＜
一次創作と二次創作雑多ですが、どちらも無言巡回致します。
今は一次創作集中しているので、自創作やってる方だと嬉しいです☺️
気ままにのんびり交流出来たら幸いです。よろしくです〜
item.content:encoded:
#ブルスカ一点集中な絵描きさんと繋がりたい
#自創作に狂っている人間と繋がりたい
併用して使わせていただきます…！
呟き系のSNSは青空くんしか利用して無いです＞＜
一次創作と二次創作雑多ですが、どちらも無言巡回致します。
今は一次創作集中しているので、自創作やってる方だと嬉しいです☺️
気ままにのんびり交流出来たら幸いです。よろしくです〜

item.title: #🔖世の中 「これまでウソを放送してきた」国営テレビが謝罪 ニュース放送を一時停止し“黒い画面”を放送 ハンガリー｜F…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖世の中
「これまでウソを放送してきた」国営テレビが謝罪　ニュース放送を一時停止し“黒い画面”を放送　ハンガリー｜FNNプライムオンライン

ハンガリーの国営テレビは7日、「これまでウソを放送してきた」として謝罪してニュース放送を一時停止し、黒い画面が放送されました。 国営テレビのこちらの黒い画面には「公共のメディアはウソをつかない。長年このような状態を続けてしまったことをお詫びします」という文字が描かれています。 そのうえで「将来的に独...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖世の中
「これまでウソを放送してきた」国営テレビが謝罪　ニュース放送を一時停止し“黒い画面”を放送　ハンガリー｜FNNプライムオンライン

ハンガリーの国営テレビは7日、「これまでウソを放送してきた」として謝罪してニュース放送を一時停止し、黒い画面が放送されました。 国営テレビのこちらの黒い画面には「公共のメディアはウソをつかない。長年このような状態を続けてしまったことをお詫びします」という文字が描かれています。 そのうえで「将来的に独...

item.title: Despite trade tensions, many of the air conditioners being s…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Despite trade tensions, many of the air conditioners being snapped up by sweaty European customers are made in China, which accounts for about 40% of global exports. NBC News' Janis Mackey Frayer reports.
item.content:encoded: Despite trade tensions, many of the air conditioners being snapped up by sweaty European customers are made in China, which accounts for about 40% of global exports. NBC News' Janis Mackey Frayer reports.

item.title: There’s no scientific basis to many of the public health con…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
There’s no scientific basis to many of the public health concerns some critics have with solar development, an expert told ProPublica.

“People try to come up with a rationale to justify their dislike of things they dislike for other reasons.”

(Published April)
item.content:encoded:
There’s no scientific basis to many of the public health concerns some critics have with solar development, an expert told ProPublica.

“People try to come up with a rationale to justify their dislike of things they dislike for other reasons.”

(Published April)

item.title: Hey, Utah teens, if you enjoyed the films Shawshank Redempti…
item.author: Martha Hickson (@sassylibrarian.bsky.social)
item.description: Hey, Utah teens, if you enjoyed the films Shawshank Redemption and Stand By Me, you’re out of luck. The state won’t let you read the Stephen King novellas on which the movies are based. This concludes today’s lesson on fascism.
item.content:encoded: Hey, Utah teens, if you enjoyed the films Shawshank Redemption and Stand By Me, you’re out of luck. The state won’t let you read the Stephen King novellas on which the movies are based. This concludes today’s lesson on fascism.

item.title: Historian of science Margaret Rossiter (b #OTD in 1944) coin…
item.author: Admirable Women (@admirablewomen.bsky.social)
item.description:
Historian of science Margaret Rossiter (b #OTD in 1944) coined the term #MatildaEffect (1993).

Named after suffragist Matilda Joslyn Gage, the Matilda Effect describes a systemic bias where women's scientific achievements are ignored, minimized, or directly attributed to their male colleagues. 1/3
item.content:encoded:
Historian of science Margaret Rossiter (b #OTD in 1944) coined the term #MatildaEffect (1993).

Named after suffragist Matilda Joslyn Gage, the Matilda Effect describes a systemic bias where women's scientific achievements are ignored, minimized, or directly attributed to their male colleagues. 1/3

item.title: This is Lucie. She likes to moo, so you can imagine why this…
item.author: WeRateDogs (@weratedogs.com)
item.description: This is Lucie. She likes to moo, so you can imagine why this herd of cows mistook her as one of their own. And vice versa. 13/10 for all (TT: luciewoos)
item.content:encoded: This is Lucie. She likes to moo, so you can imagine why this herd of cows mistook her as one of their own. And vice versa. 13/10 for all (TT: luciewoos)

item.author: O Brasil Que Deu Certo (@obrasilquedeucerto.com.br)
